collection_arn.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) for the geofence collection.

create_time.description: The timestamp when the geofence collection was created.

description.description: A brief description of the geofence collection.

id.description: The unique identifier for the geofence collection.

kms_key_id.description: The ID of the AWS Key Management Service (KMS) key used to encrypt the geofence collection.

tags.description: A map of tags associated with the geofence collection.

update_time.description: The timestamp when the geofence collection was last updated.
